title: E2 + E4: PreToolUse knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs + edit-counter sidecar
description: E2: Implement PreToolUse hook knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs. Triggers on Edit, Write, MultiEdit tool calls. Reads tool_input.file_path (or tool_input.edits[].file_path for MultiEdit, deduplicated). Invokes `fabric plan-context-hint --paths <p1,p2,...>`, parses JSON. Output rule: narrow match count > 0 → emit titles list (id + type + maturity + summary-line) + one-line footer `(如需重读 broad 决策，调 fab_plan_context 或 fabric plan-context-hint --all)`; narrow match count = 0 → complete silence (exit 0, no stderr output). E4: Hook side-effect: append Date.now() timestamp line to .fabric/.cache/edit-counter per invocation (one line per Edit/Write/MultiEdit). Anchors: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for E2 + E4.

files.change: PreToolUse hook script: read tool_input.file_path[s]; dedupe; invoke fabric plan-context-hint --paths; render narrow titles + footer to stderr if matches; silent otherwise; append timestamp to edit-counter sidecar unconditionally
Add knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs to PreToolUse hook list
Add knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs to PreToolUse hook list (Codex-CLI matcher naming)
Add knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs to PreToolUse hook list (Cursor matcher naming)

implementation: Read stdin JSON (hook event payload conventions per Claude Code hook spec); extract tool_input.file_path or tool_input.edits[].file_path; dedupe
Append Date.now() + '\n' to .fabric/.cache/edit-counter (mkdir -p first); E4 side-effect runs unconditionally
If narrow.length > 0 → stderr emit per entry: `[id] (type/maturity) summary` (one line); footer: '(如需重读 broad 决策，调 fab_plan_context 或 fabric plan-context-hint --all)'
If narrow.length === 0 → exit 0 with NO stderr output (complete silence)
Register hook with Edit|Write|MultiEdit matchers in claude-code.json + codex-hooks.json + cursor-hooks.json

Smoke test: simulate Edit on a path matching a narrow entry → verify titles emitted; simulate Edit on unrelated path → verify silent + counter incremented; verify .fabric/.cache/edit-counter file growth

reference.pattern: PreToolUse hook with tool_input parsing + side-effect sidecar
reference.examples: Hook event payload conventions from Claude Code docs

criteria: knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs registered as PreToolUse hook with matchers Edit / Write / MultiEdit in all three client configs
knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs reads tool_input.file_path (and MultiEdit edits[].file_path), dedupes
narrow matched > 0 → stderr emits title list (id + type + maturity + summary-line) + one-line footer reminder for broad
narrow matched == 0 → no stderr output, exit 0 (complete silence)
PreToolUse hook appends Date.now() timestamp line to .fabric/.cache/edit-counter per invocation
edit-counter sidecar grows by exactly one line per Edit/Write/MultiEdit invocation

rationale.chosen_approach: Single hook script does both E2 (narrow render) and E4 (edit-counter sidecar) — they share the same trigger event and tool_input parsing
alternatives_considered: Separate hooks for E2 and E4 (two PreToolUse registrations)
Server-side edit counter via API call
decision_factors: Shared trigger + parsing — combining reduces hook overhead
rationale.tradeoffs: Slightly larger hook script; tradeoff acceptable

manual_checks: Simulate Edit on matching path → titles + footer emitted to stderr; counter incremented
Simulate Edit on non-matching path → silent stderr; counter incremented
MultiEdit with 3 file_paths → all 3 paths queried, dedupe correct

risks.description: Hook event payload schema differs across Claude/Cursor/Codex
risks.mitigation: Detect payload shape; document expected shape per client; gracefully skip if shape unrecognized
